# Kyle Semple Portfolio — LLM Companion Index

This file is a crawler-readable companion to the React app. It highlights stable non-JS discovery paths and markdown mirrors.

## Static discovery pages
- /ai-index
- /ai-index.html
- /site-index
- /site-index.html

## Markdown mirrors
- /markdown/index.md
- /markdown/home.md
- /markdown/resume.md
- /markdown/tracks/forward-deployed.md
- /markdown/tracks/solutions-architect.md
- /markdown/tracks/spatial-systems.md
- /markdown/projects/guynode.md
- /markdown/projects/digital-twin.md
- /markdown/process.md

## Canonical React routes
- /
- /tracks/forward-deployed
- /tracks/solutions-architect
- /tracks/spatial-systems
- /projects
- /projects/guynode
- /projects/digital-twin
- /projects/ops-triage

- /projects/project-aegis
- /projects/nba-systems-qa
- /projects/luxe-lofts
- /portfolio2/deep-dive
- /resume
- /site-index
